newsArray.title: IPL 2026, KKR vs PBKS Preview: जीत का खाता खोलने उतरेगी तीन बार की चैंपियन केकेआर, पंजाब किंग्स के खिलाफ जोरदार होगा मुकाबला
newsArray.description: KKR vs PBKS Match Preview: कोलकाता नाईट राइडर्स और पंजाब किंग्स के बीच आज (6 अप्रैल 2016) इंडियन प्रीमियर लीग (आईपीएल) के 19वें सीजन का 12वां मुकाबला खेला जाएगा। दोनों टीमों के बीच यह मुकाबला कोलकाता के ईडन गार्डन्स क्रिकेट स्टेडियम में भारतीय समयानुसार शाम 7:30 बजे शुरु होगा। जानिए इस मुकाबले से जुड़ी जरूरी बातें।
creator: aditya sahu

newsArray.title: WATCH: Sanjiv Goenka Hugs Rishabh Pant After LSG Win in IPL 2026, Video Goes Viral
newsArray.description: In the chase, LSG lost Mitch Marsh early, but a 40-run stand between Aiden Markram (45 in 27 balls, with six fours and two sixes) and Pant brought them back to the game. Pant managed to stick around till the end with Mukul Choudhary (2*), finishing off the game with five wickets and a ball in hand.
creator: somya kapoor

newsArray.title: Virat Kohli Record: आईपीएल में कोहली ने तोड़ा एक और रिकॉर्ड, अब पीछे छूटे रोहित शर्मा
newsArray.description: Virat Kohli Record: विराट कोहली ने चेन्नई सुपर किंग्स के खिलाफ एक और बड़ा रिकॉर्ड अपने नाम कर लिया। अब वह एक टीम के खिलाफ सर्वाधिक रन बनाने के मामले में रोहित शर्मा से आगे निकल गए। रोहित ने इसी सीजन यह रिकॉर्ड अपने नाम किया था।
keywords: virat kohli break rohit sharma record
creator: sameer thakur

newsArray.title: IPL: 'All that ends well is all well,' says LSG skipper Rishabh Pant
newsArray.description: LSG skipper Rishabh Pant scored an unbeaten 68* to guide his team to victory against SRH. Pant said 'all that ends well is all well' and that his bat will do the talking, also crediting his bowlers for their performance in the match.

newsArray.title: KKR's Tim Southee Optimistic About Cameron Green's Bowling Comeback
newsArray.description: As the Kolkata Knight Riders gear up for their match against the Punjab Kings, coach Tim Southee is optimistic about Cameron Green's imminent return to bowling. Following two disappointing losses, KKR is eager to secure their first win of the season. With key bowlers absent, the team faces challenges, but Southee expresses confidence in the young pace attack's potential. He emphasizes the importance of consistency and skill development among his bowlers. This article delves into the team's current situation and the expectations surrounding Green's comeback.
creator: narendra chaudhary

newsArray.title: IPL 2026: KKR seamers lack experience not skill, insists bowling coach
newsArray.description: KKR’s pace unit are battling multiple absences and even though Blessing Muzarabani claimed four wickets in their 65-run defeat to Sunrisers Hyderabad, talented youngsters Vaibhav Arora and Kartik Tyagi are visibly short on experience.
creator: sayan mukherjee
